title: Receivables, Payables & Cash
description: AR/AP ageing, collections worklist and cash-flow view built from submitted Sales/Purchase Invoices, Payment Entries and GL. Outstanding is reconstructed from GL Entry (is_cancelled=0) so payment-rounding residuals don't inflate receivables/payables. Snapshot figures are as-of-today in base currency; the date filter drives the cash-flow trends. docstatus=1 only.
